_comment: Template for branch protection rules. Apply via your git host's API or UI. GitHub and Bitbucket use different API schemas — adapt field names as indicated by the _github_equivalent and _bitbucket_equivalent keys inside each rule. This file represents the desired policy; the field names here are generic. Do not use this JSON verbatim as an API payload without translating to your platform's schema.

require_pull_request._comment: No direct push to main. All changes must arrive via a PR. This is the foundational rule — all others depend on it.
require_pull_request._github_equivalent: required_pull_request_reviews (present in ruleset) or branch protection 'required_pull_request_reviews' object
require_pull_request._bitbucket_equivalent: restriction type 'push' scoped to the target branch; combined with a merge check requiring at least one approval

required_approvals._comment: Minimum number of reviewer approvals before a PR can be merged. 1 is the floor. Increase for higher-risk repos or regulated environments.

require_status_checks._comment: All required CI checks must pass before merge is allowed. Define which check names are required — do not leave this as 'any passing check'. Specific check names are set per repo in your CI config.
required_checks: _placeholder: replace with your actual CI check names, e.g. 'ci/lint', 'ci/test', 'ci/build'
require_status_checks._github_equivalent: required_status_checks.contexts (list of check names) and required_status_checks.strict
require_status_checks._bitbucket_equivalent: Bitbucket Pipelines: enable 'Require passing builds before merging' under branch permissions; specific step names set in bitbucket-pipelines.yml

require_up_to_date._comment: The PR branch must be up to date with main before merge is allowed. Prevents a scenario where two approved PRs conflict — the second must rebase or merge main before landing.
require_up_to_date._bitbucket_equivalent: No direct equivalent in Bitbucket branch permissions; enforce via merge check or CI step that fails if the branch is behind main (e.g. git merge-base check in pipeline)

allow_force_push._comment: Force push to main is prohibited. This protects history integrity and prevents accidental or intentional rewriting of the shared baseline.
allow_force_push._github_equivalent: allow_force_pushes: false (branch protection) or 'non_fast_forward' restriction in rulesets
allow_force_push._bitbucket_equivalent: restriction type 'force' scoped to the target branch in branch restrictions API

allow_deletion._comment: The main branch cannot be deleted. Guards against accidental deletion via UI or API.
allow_deletion._github_equivalent: allow_deletions: false (branch protection) or omit 'deletion' from ruleset bypass list
allow_deletion._bitbucket_equivalent: restriction type 'delete' scoped to the target branch in branch restrictions API
